title: Auto Generate a date when status changes
excerpt: I want to automate a column that when you change a stage to something it auto-generates todays date.

posts.author: donmaupin (Donald Maupin)
posts.cookedHtml: I want to automate a column that when you change a stage to something it auto-generates todays date.

posts.author: GiannisKoukounas (Giannis Koukounas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Donald!

This should work for you, just create a Date Column where you will ‘‘store’’ the day the status changes.
